title: Augmented reality based untethered x-ray imaging system control
abstract: Various embodiments of the present disclosure encompass an augmented reality display (30), augmented reality sensors (40), and a virtual X-ray controller (20). In a display (30) operational phase, the virtual X-ray controller (20) controls a display (30) by the augmented reality display (30) of a virtual imaging control (23) of an operational feature of an X-ray imaging system (70), and the augmented reality sensors (40) sense an operator interaction with the virtual control of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70). In a command operational phase, the virtual X-ray controller (20) derives virtual control command(s) of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70) from the sensing by the augmented reality sensors (40) of the operator interaction with the virtual control of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70), and further communicates the virtual imaging command(s) to an X-ray imaging controller (60) for virtually controlling an imaging operation of the X-ray imaging system (70).
claims:
Claims Claims 1. An augmented reality X-ray imaging control device, comprising: an augmented reality display (30); at least one augmented reality sensor (40); and a virtual X-ray controller (20), wherein the virtual X-ray controller (20) is configured to control a display (30) by the augmented reality display (30) of a virtual imaging control (23) of an operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70), wherein the virtual X-ray controller (20) is further configured to derive at least one virtual imaging command of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70) from a sensing by the at least one augmented reality sensor (40) of an operator interaction with the virtual imaging control (23) of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70), and wherein the virtual X-ray controller (20) is further configured to communicate the at least one virtual imaging command to an X-ray imaging controller (60) for virtually controlling an imaging operation of the X-ray imaging system (70). 2. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control device of claim 1, wherein the virtual imaging control (23) is a hologram of a component of the X- ray imaging system (70). 3. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control device of claim 1, wherein the virtual imaging control (23) represents a landmarking of at least one of an X-ray image, a reconstructed image and a hologram. 4. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control device of claim 1, wherein the virtual imaging control (23) represents an imaging panel of the X- ray imaging system (70). 5. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control device of claim 1, 

 wherein the least one virtual imaging command controls a posing of the X-ray imaging system (70). 6. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control device of claim 1, wherein the least one virtual imaging command controls a positioning of the X- ray imaging system (70). 7. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control device of claim 1, wherein the least one virtual imaging command controls a collimation of the X- ray imaging system (70). 8. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control device of claim 1, wherein the virtual imaging controller (60) is installed in one of the X-ray imaging system (70), an augmented reality device or a stand-alone workstation. 9. An augmented reality X-ray imaging control system, comprising: an X-ray imaging controller (60) configured to control an imaging operation of an X-ray imaging system (70); an augmented reality display (30); at least one augmented reality sensor (40); and a virtual X-ray controller (20), wherein the virtual X-ray controller (20) is configured to control a display (30) by the augmented reality display (30) of a virtual imaging control (23) of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70), wherein the virtual X-ray controller (20) is further configured to derive at least one virtual imaging command of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70) from a sensing by the at least one reality sensor (40) of an operator interaction with the virtual imaging control (23) of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70), and wherein the virtual X-ray controller (20) is further configured to communicate the at least one virtual imaging command to the X-ray imaging controller (60) for virtually controlling the imaging operation of the X-ray imaging system (70). 10. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control system of claim 9, wherein the virtual imaging control (23) is a hologram of a component of the X- ray imaging system (70). 11. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control system of claim 9, wherein the virtual imaging control (23) represents an imaging panel of the X- ray imaging system (70). 12. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control system of claim 9, wherein the virtual imaging control (23) represents a landmarking of at least one of an X-ray image, a reconstructed image and a hologram. 13. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control system of claim 9, wherein the least one virtual imaging command controls a posing of the X-ray imaging system (70). 14. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control system of claim 9, wherein the least one virtual imaging command controls a positioning of the X- ray imaging system (70). 15. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control system of claim 9, wherein the least one virtual imaging command controls a collimation of the X- ray imaging system (70). 16. An augmented reality X-ray imaging control method, comprising: controlling, via a virtual X-ray controller (20), a display (30) by an augmented reality display (30) of a virtual imaging control (23) of an operational feature of an X- ray imaging system (70); deriving, via the virtual X-ray controller (20), at least one virtual imaging command of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70) from a sensing 

by at least one reality sensor (40) of an operator interaction with the virtual imaging control (23) of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70); and communicating, via the virtual X-ray controller (20), the at least one virtual imaging command to an X-ray imaging controller (60) for virtually controlling an imaging operation of the X-ray imaging system (70). 17. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control method of claim 16, wherein at one of: the virtual imaging control (23) is a hologram of a component of the X-ray imaging system (70); the virtual imaging control (23) represents an imaging panel of the X-ray imaging system (70); and the virtual imaging control (23) represents a landmarking of at least one of an X-ray image, a reconstructed image and a hologram. 18. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control method of claim 16, wherein at one of: the least one virtual imaging command controls a posing of the X-ray imaging system (70); the least one virtual imaging command controls a positioning of the X-ray imaging system (70); and the least one virtual imaging command controls a collimation of the X-ray imaging system (70). 19. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control method of claim 16, further comprising: controlling, via the virtual X-ray controller (20), a display (30) by an additional augmented reality display (30) of an additional virtual imaging control (23) of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70); deriving, via the virtual X-ray controller (20), at least one virtual imaging command of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70) from a sensing by a plurality of reality sensor (40)s of operator interactions with the virtual imaging 

control (23) and the additional virtual imaging control (23) of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70). 20. The augmented reality X-ray imaging control method of claim 16, wherein controlling, via the virtual X-ray controller (20), a display (30) by the augmented reality display (30) of the virtual imaging control (23) of the operational feature of the X-ray imaging system (70) is based on an operator profile.
